name: @guardian-swarm/guardian-swarm
description: Portable multi-agent software engineering skills repository for autonomous coding agents

scripts.dev: node -e "require('http').createServer((req, res) => res.end('Guardian Swarm initialized. Open the repository docs to begin.')).listen(3000)"
scripts.build: echo 'No build required for a skills repository.'
scripts.start: node -e "require('http').createServer((req, res) => res.end('Guardian Swarm initialized. Open the repository docs to begin.')).listen(3000)"
scripts.test: npm run preflight && node --test tests/*.test.js && node scripts/validate-repo.js
